title: Port breakdown_lookahead
description: Port ts_parser__breakdown_lookahead from C parser.c. Decomposes reused composite nodes back into individual tokens for error recovery. Called in advanceVersion Recover path when lookahead has child_count > 0. Needed for incremental parsing + error recovery. Include unit tests.
close_reason: Implemented and pushed on feat/breakdown-lookahead (a6e1bd0). Ported C ts_parser__breakdown_lookahead with 3 call sites + GLR split loop. 5 unit tests, no regressions.
